TensorQTL report

Darren Cameron

2026-01-20

TensorQTL pipeline steps

We used tensorQTL to generate eQTL. The citation for tensorQTL is Taylor-Weiner et al. 2019 (DOI:10.1186/s13059-019-1836-7).

  1. prep_tensorQTL_input: Munge cell-specific pseudobulk gExp and covaraiate data into TensorQTL-ready format
  2. zip_pblk_cnts: bgzip and index pseudobulk gExp data
  3. convert_genotypes: Convert genotypes into into TensorQTL-ready plink 2 format
  4. split_covariates: Generate covaraiate files for gene_pc and exp_pc combinations
  5. tensorqtl_nom: Run TensorQTL to detect cis-eQTL nominal p-values
  6. tensorqtl_perm: Run TensorQTL to detect cis-eQTL via permutations
  7. tensorqtl_independent: Run TensorQTL to detect conditionally independent variants
  8. tensorqtl_trans: Run TensorQTL to detect trans-eQTL

Settings:

  • cis-window: \(\pm\) 500kb
  • Expression PC covariates tested: 10, 20, 30, 40, 50
  • Meta data covariates: PCW, sex
  • Genotype PCs: 4 (see genotyping_post_impute_report.html)
  • Norm methods tested: bryois, fugita, quantile, xue
